channel.title: Comments on: Dogfish Head Red & White – Ep. 44
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Ryan
item.dc:creator: Ryan
item.description: I had this beer a few days ago per your suggestion on how great it is. This is an amazing easy to drink beer that I am glad I tried.
item.content:encoded: I had this beer a few days ago per your suggestion on how great it is. This is an amazing easy to drink beer that I am glad I tried.

item.title: By: David Little
item.dc:creator: David Little
item.description: Hey Pink .... what'd you have to do to get those beads?
item.content:encoded: Hey Pink …. what’d you have to do to get those beads?

item.title: By: t.b.
item.dc:creator: t.b.
item.description: Is that the Moon River Brewery? Like the backdrop. Very Nice. I will be trying the product! All the best! Pink....... Got Comb?? Tom
item.content:encoded:
Is that the Moon River Brewery?
Like the backdrop.
Very Nice.
I will be trying the product!
All the best!
Pink……. Got Comb??
Tom
